title: SIP-AI Private Inference Credit (Voucher)
description: An issuer-signed bearer credit. Whoever holds the voucher (with its secret voucher_id) may redeem it. The signature covers the canonical voucher with the `signature` field removed.

voucher_id.description: High-entropy bearer secret (base64url, >=32 bytes). Holding it is ownership; it is also the double-spend key.

denomination.description: Face value of the credit, as a decimal string.
